APEUSDT.P.bias: Fresh impulsive rally off the 0.1345 higher-low is pushing directly into the old 0.150-0.152 range top (this week's prior resistance). Do not chase into the level; only a confirmed reclaim-and-hold, followed by a retest that holds, is tradable.
APEUSDT.P.btc_eth_filter: Conflicting. BTC and ETH are red (~-1.3% to -1.7%) while APE is today's standout gainer (+6.9%); reduces confidence on a long pushing into resistance.
APEUSDT.P.catalyst: Unverified. Visible TradingView news is a 6-day-old BAYC/ETH headline, not a fresh APE-specific catalyst.
APEUSDT.P.setup_type: Breaker / Failed Supply-Demand Flip / Compression-to-Expansion Breakout

entry.basis: Deep retest of the 0.1345 higher-low / rally launch zone, only after 0.1520 reclaims and holds. Requires a rejection/confirmation candle inside the zone, not a blind limit.

APEUSDT.P.invalidation: 1H acceptance below 0.1295, or a failed reclaim that closes back below 0.1520 without ever holding.
APEUSDT.P.nearest_liquidity: Buy-side above 0.1520 then 0.1580 (untested spike high) and 0.1620/0.1700; sell-side below 0.1345 then 0.1295 and the deeper 4H base near 0.1260.
APEUSDT.P.reclaim_status: Price is testing 0.1520 (old range top) right now; not yet confirmed as reclaimed and held.
APEUSDT.P.relative_strength: Strong intraday (best performer on the visible watchlist while BTC/ETH are red), but this is a bounce within a multi-month downtrend on the daily chart, not a structural trend reversal.
APEUSDT.P.notes: 2026-07-08 first analysis. Daily chart shows a multi-month downtrend from ~0.65 to sub-0.10 lows with a blow-off spike to 0.33 in May that fully retraced; current bounce is counter-trend within that structure. Shallow retest into 0.1440-0.1470 fails the intraday R:R floor (~1.3R to first liquidity) and should be skipped even if it happens; only the deep 0.1345-0.1375 zone clears 2R to TP1. If price never returns there, this is MISSED / NO CHASE, not a thesis loss.

FARTCOINUSDT.P.bias: Prior conditional setup only; needs fresh review before reuse

USUSDT.P.bias: Post pump-and-dump. Full retrace complete; price is entering the impulse origin base (0.0164-0.0176). Only a confirmed base reaction is tradable; falling-knife limits are forbidden.
USUSDT.P.btc_eth_filter: Mildly conflicting. BTC -1.6% and ETH -2.1%; risk-off day reduces long confidence.
USUSDT.P.catalyst: Unverified. Whatever drove the pump is unconfirmed and it fully retraced; check manually before sizing.
USUSDT.P.setup_type: Standard Supply/Demand Retest / Impulse Origin Base

entry.basis: Impulse origin base retest per Parabolic Spike Rule. Requires a 1H rejection/confirmation candle inside the base; no blind limit into the dump.

USUSDT.P.invalidation: 1H acceptance below 0.0158 kills the base; below that, next demand is 0.0127-0.0140 and the long idea is dead.
USUSDT.P.nearest_liquidity: Buy-side above 0.0182 bounce high, then 0.0205-0.0208 shelf and 0.0217; sell-side below 0.0170 overnight low, then 0.0158 and 0.0152 base wicks.
USUSDT.P.reclaim_status: 0.0182 is the strength trigger: a 1H close above it after a base hold confirms the reaction. Not reclaimed; price is fading into the base.
USUSDT.P.relative_strength: Worst performer on the visible day (-26% vs BTC -1.6%); this is a mean-reversion base play, not a relative-strength long.
USUSDT.P.notes: 2026-07-07 ~06:26 UTC+1 reanalysis after full pump retrace. Chart canvas failed to render in the automated tab; levels derived from the 06:11 UTC+1 1H capture, live tick (~0.0179), and ledger history. Spike rule applied: only the origin-base retest long is valid; overhead 0.0205-0.0217 is supply until reclaimed. CHART NOT MARKED - indicator re-paste required.

JTOUSDT.P.bias: Violent unverified-catalyst breakdown: JTO fell ~18% today, breaking a week-long 0.65-0.68 4H demand shelf. Price is still actively falling with no base printed yet. Per the Parabolic Spike Rule (mirrored for downside), no blind knife-catch long and no blind short chase; the only valid plan is a retest-and-reject of the broken 0.65-0.68 shelf as new resistance.
JTOUSDT.P.btc_eth_filter: Aligned. BTC -2.3% and ETH -2.4% are red, supporting a bearish/short bias, though the magnitude of JTO's move (-18%) is far beyond market-wide weakness.
JTOUSDT.P.catalyst: Unverified. Only visible news is an 11-day-old bullish 'Jito Surges' headline from Jun 27; it does not explain today's breakdown. Check manually before sizing.

entry.basis: Retest of the broken 0.65-0.68 4H demand shelf (now resistance) from below. Requires a rejection/confirmation candle inside the zone; no blind short while price is still in freefall with no base.

JTOUSDT.P.invalidation: 1H acceptance above 0.705 invalidates the breaker; a clean reclaim-and-hold above 0.68 would need a fresh continuation-long analysis instead.
JTOUSDT.P.nearest_liquidity: Buy-side above 0.65-0.68 shelf, then 0.72-0.74 prior range; sell-side below current price has no clean tested demand yet - next structural reference is the 0.45-0.48 zone from the April/May basing range.
JTOUSDT.P.reclaim_status: Not reclaimed. Price is well below the 0.65-0.68 zone and still declining; no retest has occurred.
JTOUSDT.P.relative_strength: Sharply underperforming BTC/ETH today (-18% vs -2.3%/-2.4%), which supports the short thesis under the Relative Strength Filter for shorts.
JTOUSDT.P.notes: 2026-07-08 first analysis. No clean setup exists yet because price has not based - do not chase either direction. SL at 0.705 is honestly Vulnerable given todays realized volatility (18% range), not Safe. R:R on the conservative edge is 1.8R/2.7R, which fails the intraday TP1 >= 2 floor - rating stays Watch Only, not Clean/Conditional Trade, until either the SL can be tightened on a real base or TP1 sits at a closer liquidity pool. Reanalyze once a base/reaction candle prints.

KMNOUSDT.P.bias: 4H structure shows a genuine higher-low recovery since the May low (~0.0126 -> June low ~0.0140 -> current range floor ~0.0185), but price is mid-range right now (0.0205) between the 0.0185-0.0190 demand and 0.0220 resistance. No edge to chase mid-range; wait for the retest.
KMNOUSDT.P.btc_eth_filter: Mixed. BTC (+1.2%) and ETH (+0.9%) are green today while KMNO is red (-0.8%) intraday despite the 4H candle printing +1.7%; KMNO is lagging broader market strength, not leading it.
KMNOUSDT.P.catalyst: Unverified. Only visible news is a stale Jun 19 Upbit listing headline, 3 weeks old; not a fresh catalyst.

entry.basis: Retest of the proven 0.0185-0.0190 demand zone (held Jun 21, Jul 3, Jul 7-8). Requires a confirmation/rejection candle in the zone, not a blind limit.

KMNOUSDT.P.invalidation: 1H acceptance below 0.0178 breaks the higher-low structure and invalidates the recovery thesis.
KMNOUSDT.P.nearest_liquidity: Buy-side above 0.0220 range top, then 0.0230 (mid-June high) and 0.0260 (April supply); sell-side below 0.0185, then 0.0178 and the June 0.0140 swing low.
KMNOUSDT.P.reclaim_status: Not tested. Price is mid-range at 0.0205; has not returned to the 0.0185-0.0190 zone since the last hold.
KMNOUSDT.P.relative_strength: Lagging BTC/ETH today, but constructive on the higher-low 4H structure since the May capitulation low - medium-term basing, not immediate strength.
KMNOUSDT.P.notes: 2026-07-09 first analysis, read from live chart (4H 3-month + 1H 7-week views). Range-bound structure, not a spike scenario. SL quality read as Vulnerable rather than Safe since exact wick-low buffer wasn't pixel-verified from the chart read.

journal.result: Chart's 'AutoTrader Trade Map' script source was corrupted to a garbage string, with two stacked broken instances on the chart. Not a trading mistake; APE's setup thesis was unaffected and rendered correctly once fixed.
journal.note: Recovery: reload the chart tab, reopen Pine Editor, select-all + paste correct script via a real paste event (clipboard write + native paste, or a synthetic ClipboardEvent dispatched on the Monaco .inputarea if OS clipboard permission is unavailable), save, then explicitly click Add to chart (saving alone does not reattach a removed/broken instance). Verify by reading the rendered card, not by absence of the compile-error icon alone.
